specs.canonical_statement: Fine-tuning wording is bounded to PES selection proportional to the maximum SEC available for observed constants.
specs.claim_boundary: source-bounded fine-tuning PES roadmap contract; not empirical evidence
executable_validation_targets: score observed SEC against a finite candidate SEC set
reject using the simulator score as fine-tuning evidence
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > II. Fine-Tuning and the Principle of Ethical Selection (PES):
validation_targets: score observed SEC against a finite candidate SEC set
reject using the simulator score as fine-tuning evidence

specs.canonical_statement: Advanced protocol wording is bounded to four source-listed proposals: PTA, AWVA, QRNG-TSVF priming, and CEF-RG analysis.
specs.claim_boundary: source-bounded fine-tuning PES roadmap contract; not empirical evidence
executable_validation_targets: require method and target-layer labels for each protocol
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > II. Fine-Tuning and the Principle of Ethical Selection (PES):
source_protocols: PTA:L5:TMS/tFUS plus TDA Betti-number qualia correlation
QRNG-TSVF:L9:retrocausal priming with future QRNG stimuli
validation_targets: require method and target-layer labels for each protocol

specs.canonical_statement: Protocol wording is promoted as a validation roadmap only, with no hardware, neurophysiology, or cosmology evidence implied by the source.
specs.claim_boundary: source-bounded fine-tuning PES roadmap contract; not empirical evidence
executable_validation_targets: separate proposed protocols from completed experiments
require explicit falsification controls before empirical claims
reject protocol presence as validation of PES or fine tuning
null_controls: completed-experiment claim control must be rejected
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > II. Fine-Tuning and the Principle of Ethical Selection (PES):

summary.policy: P0R06378-P0R06381 are promoted as source-covered fine-tuning PES roadmap specifications only. Passing fixtures is not empirical evidence.
